title: Re-use of Public Sector Information Regulations 2015 and Crown copyright in Knowledge Asset Commercialisation
body: "This guide supports Public Sector Bodies in commercialising their Knowledge Assets (KAs) outside of the public sector, in compliance with the Re-use of Public Sector Information Regulations 2015 (the Regulations) and Crown copyright.  The guide offers a practical framework to help navigate the Regulations and Crown copyright and database rights rules relevant to public sector KAs.  The guide covers:   compliance with the Regulations Crown copyright and its licensing requirements different KA types and key considerations for determining the best route for commercialisation potential routes for commercialisation   This has been developed in collaboration with The National Archives. For more information on the guide, email gott@dsit.gov.uk.  "
